chapter_title.en: Chapter on Recognizing the Major Sins for Which Allah {swt}, the Almighty, Has Threatened with Hellfire

text: 4935 - وَ رَوَى هِشَامُ بْنُ سَالِمٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ أَنَّهُ قَالَ: "إِنَّمَا حَرَّمَ اَللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ اَلرِّبَا كَيْلاَ يَمْتَنِعُوا مِنْ صَنَائِعِ اَلْمَعْرُوفِ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4935 - Hisham ibn Salim narrated from Abu Abdillah (as) that he said:
"Indeed, Allah (swt), the Mighty and Majestic, only forbade usury so that people would not refrain from acts of kindness."
